name: ui-compare-playwright
description: Automated UI comparison between two environments

scripts.test:landingpage-compare: npm run test:landingpage && npm run open-landingpage
scripts.test:ux-research-compare: npm run test:ux-research && npm run open-ux-research
scripts.test:mobile-app-ui-design-compare: npm run test:mobile-app-ui-design && npm run open-mobile-app-ui-design
scripts.test:custom-website-design-compare: npm run test:custom-website-design && npm run open-custom-website-design
scripts.test:brand-identity-design-compare: npm run test:brand-identity-design && npm run open-brand-identity-design
scripts.test:web-app-design-compare: npm run test:web-app-design && npm run open-web-app-design
scripts.test:saas-website-design-compare: npm run test:saas-website-design && npm run open-saas-website-design
scripts.test:website-redesign-compare: npm run test:website-redesign && npm run open-website-redesign
scripts.test:all-pages: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/all-pages-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:all-pages-compare: npm run test:all-pages && npm run open-all-pages
scripts.test:all-tests: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/ --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:complete-comparison: rm -rf test-results && npx playwright test tests/complete-ui-compare.spec.ts --project=chrome --reporter=line
scripts.test:complete-comparison-report: npm run test:complete-comparison && npm run open-complete-report
